Patch Set 4:

(1 comment)

Sorry, I probably should have +1 the previous patch, but I was waiting to see if the testing passed.

It looks like this had a timeout in the custom ZFS test session, and it isn't clear to me if that is an issue with ZFS or the patch.  Please review the failure and restart if unrelated to this patch.

Patch Set 4:

> Sorry, I probably should have +1 the previous patch, but I was waiting to see if the testing passed.
> 
> It looks like this had a timeout in the custom ZFS test session, and it isn't clear to me if that is an issue with ZFS or the patch.  Please review the failure and restart if unrelated to this patch.

Ok, sorry for that.

This patch fix a ZFS issue (the file was not allocate on the OST0000 due to ZFS replay barrier). Maybe the LU-17792 has other causes .

I took some time to analyzes the test failure. It seems to be a legit bug (not cover by LU-14027 fix).

The test 135 hang in "lfs df", the recovery state machine hang in REPLAY because of delayed replay lock request (inflight):

00000100:00080000:0.0:1731410245.664791:0:6963:0:(import.c:83:import_set_state_nolock()) ffff9de585da7800 lustre-OST0000_UUID: changing import state from REPLAY_LOCKS to CONNECTING
00000100:00080000:0.0:1731410245.665009:0:6963:0:(client.c:1720:ptlrpc_send_new_req()) @@@ req waiting for recovery: (REPLAY_LOCKS != CONNECTING)  req@ffff9de5bf61fa80 x1815509991706240/t0(0) o101->lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff9de58370d800@10.240.38.243@tcp:28/4 lens 328/400 e 0 to 0 dl 0 ref 1 fl Rpc:WQU/240/ffffffff rc 0/-1 job:'ldlm_lock_repla.0' uid:0 gid:0

I will propose a fix in the LU-16753.

commit.subject: LU-17792 tests: fix replay-single 135 "not in REPLAY_LOCKS"
commit.message:
LU-17792 tests: fix replay-single 135 "not in REPLAY_LOCKS"

Fix test replay-single 135:
Error: 'import is not in REPLAY_LOCKS state

Wrong OST was selected for object creation due to ZFS replay-barrier:
it set the OSD to read-only and then the MDT QOS discard it.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: fstype=zfs testlist=replay-single
Test-Parameters: fstype=zfs testlist=replay-single
Test-Parameters: fstype=ldiskfs testlist=replay-single
Test-Parameters: fstype=ldiskfs testlist=replay-single
Test-Parameters: fstype=zfs testlist=replay-single env=ONLY=135,ONLY_REPEAT=150
